summary: Iteration 25 retest: BOTH bugfixes + RESTRUCTURE verified PASS. Backend pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration25.py: 35/35 PASS in 6.83s — including TestSignOff::test_senior_cannot_edit_signed_off (which exercises the exact BUG-FIX 1 scenario: Manager creates safeguarding-flagged session with status=planned, Manager signs off, Senior PATCH → expected 403/409, got 403; Manager PATCH same session → 200). Frontend Playwright (Manager session): (a) BUG-FIX 2 verified — Dashboard renders with NO React error overlay, [data-testid=practice-attention-card] visible, clicking practice-attention-open-btn navigates to /key-work successfully (no useNavigate ReferenceError). (b) RESTRUCTURE 1 verified — sidebar contains NO 'Therapeutic Practice' group; nav-key-work / nav-frameworks / nav-resources data-testids do NOT exist anywhere in the page; sidebar text does not contain 'Therapeutic Practice'. (c) RESTRUCTURE 2 verified — deep-link routes /key-work, /frameworks (9 cards via [data-testid^=framework-card-]), /resources (9 packs visible in screenshot — all 9 themes present: ebd, education engagement, emotional regulation, exploitation, healthy relationships, identity self esteem, independence skills, missing from care prevention, trauma) all functional. (d) RESTRUCTURE 3 verified — Resident Profile (Maddy a1fb73b6) → Daily Care tab → acc-key-work accordion present; expanded panel shows resident-kw-browse-frameworks and resident-kw-browse-resources footer links; clicking each navigates to /frameworks and /resources respectively. (e) RESTRUCTURE 4 verified — exactly 8 resident tabs in correct order: tab-overview, tab-daily-care, tab-safeguarding, tab-health, tab-education, tab-finance, tab-documents, tab-timeline. tab-key-work and tab-therapeutic do NOT exist. Zero pageerrors and zero console.error events captured during the full session.
critical_code_review_comments: ResidentDetail.jsx is now 1797 lines — past the 700-line guideline; the inline KeyWorkPanel + many tab subcomponents are good extraction candidates into /components/resident/*.

server.py is at 5800+ lines (already flagged in iteration 24). PATCH /api/key-work/sessions/{id} guard is correct (line 5943: depends solely on signed_off_at). Consider raising HTTP 409 (Conflict) instead of 403 for 'frozen-after-signoff' edits to semantically distinguish from RBAC denial — the current 403 is what the test asserts and is acceptable, but two different denial reasons (insufficient role vs. record locked) sharing the same status code makes API consumers ambiguous.

ResidentDetail KeyWorkPanel footer 'Therapeutic resources' link row is purely textual — consider adding a small subtle divider/heading and an explicit 'or' between Frameworks library and Resource packs links to improve discoverability without making the accordion footer too dense (minor UX).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all 4 RESTRUCTURE checks + both bugfixes (8/8 tabs verified, 0 forbidden tabs present, 0 sidebar nav-key-work/frameworks/resources, 9 frameworks + 9 resource packs render, both footer links navigate)

test_credentials: Manager: manager@care.local / Manager@123 — verified on the live preview URL.
seed_data_creation: Test run on Maddy O'Brien (a1fb73b6-aced-4cf3-a053-0b861183f897) created several TEST_iter25-prefixed key_work_sessions (planned, completed, and signed-off variants). One TEST_iter25 session left signed-off; one TEST_iter25 'manager edit ok' plan persisted. No incidents/documents/photos were touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 is fully GREEN after the retest. The two reported bugs (PATCH guard depends solely on signed_off_at; Dashboard imports useNavigate) are both fixed and verified end-to-end. The RESTRUCTURE (Therapeutic Practice removed from sidebar, Resident Profile collapsed to 8 tabs with KeyWorkPanel surfaced inside Daily Care → acc-key-work accordion + Frameworks/Resources discovery footer links) is in place. Reusable assets: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration25.py (35 tests, 7s) covers frameworks + resource-packs + topics + guided-prompts + sessions CRUD + RBAC + sign-off + PDF + smart recommendations + audit regression — keep using it as the regression suite. The /resources page resource cards do not use a [data-testid^=resource-pack-card-] pattern (selector returned 0) — main agent may want to add that data-testid to ResourcesList cards for future selector-based UI tests; visual rendering is unaffected and all 9 packs are present. Nothing else outstanding.
rca of the issue: BUG-FIX 1 root cause was the previous PATCH guard requiring both signed_off_at AND status=='completed' to lock the record; signed-off-at-status-planned sessions could still be edited by Senior. Fix: server.py line ~5943 changed to `if before.get('signed_off_at') and role_tier(user.get('role')) < 3: raise 403` — drop the status check. Verified by TestSignOff::test_senior_cannot_edit_signed_off PASS. BUG-FIX 2 root cause was Dashboard.jsx importing only Link from react-router-dom while PracticeAttentionCard used useNavigate, throwing ReferenceError and crashing the whole Dashboard render under React's error boundary. Fix: Dashboard.jsx line 2 now imports `{ Link, useNavigate }`. Verified by zero pageerrors during full Dashboard load + practice-attention-card visible + click navigation succeeded.
